author: Otoha
description: Read the current note aloud — device voice, or high-quality neural voices via the free Otoha app — with sentence highlighting and smooth follow-scrolling. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Otoha
manifest.description: Read the current note aloud — device voice, or high-quality neural voices via the free Otoha app — with sentence highlighting and smooth follow-scrolling.
manifest.name: Otoha TTS

name: Otoha TTS

releases.author: spacegrowth
releases.description:
Otoha TTS 0.1.0 — read the current Obsidian note aloud with in-place sentence
highlighting and smooth follow-scroll. Works standalone with the device voice; optional
local Kokoro server for neural voices. Localhost-only, no telemetry.

Manual install: download main.js, manifest.json, styles.css into
`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/otoha-tts/` and enable the plugin.
releases.name: Otoha TTS 0.1.0
